subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come from the Most Exalted Horizon, verily He is the Lord of all humanity, the Sovereign of both throne and dust, the Master of the hereafter and this world. Whoso cleaveth unto Him hath truly laid hold on God's mighty cord, and whoso turneth away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی من الأفق الأعلی انه هو مولی الوری و رب العرش و الثری و مالک الآخرة و الأولی من تمسک به انه تمسک بحبل الله المتین و من اعرض
